name: Chocolate Minirolls
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Instant nonfat dry milk powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the baking chocolate and butter, and melt over hot water, stirring until the mixture is smooth and well blended. Stir in the corn syrup and vanilla. Remove from heat. Add the instant nonfat dry milk powder and confectioners' sugar, mixing together until it is hard to stir.
2. Place the mixture on a smooth counter top that has been lightly sprinkled with sugar. Knead until smooth and easy to roll out. Divide the mixture into 4 parts.
3. Shape each part into a 12-inch long roll. Cut the rolls into 2-inch lengths. Wrap each candy individually in plastic wrap. Store in the refrigerator.
